title: The Demo is OUT NOW!!!
contents_preview: That's right! Right now you can play the first four cases of Database Detective: Minor Crimes Edition!!This demo should cover the basics of SQL querying, where you get to play around with concepts such as JOINS and aggregate functions.Please let me know if you have any feedback!
